channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.11
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.11

  • Faster model loading — Models are now prewarmed in the background after download, so first transcription starts in seconds instead of minutes
  • Better loading feedback — Shows model name, elapsed time counter, and explains CoreML compilation during model loading
  • Prewarm indicator — Settings shows when a model is being optimized for your device
